DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative while conducting operations that require two LRCS provided:

ListItem.Para: SATVOICE services are available as a LRCS over the intended route of flight.
The ICAO flight plan is updated (as required) to notify ATC of the communications equipment status of the aircraft.

If SATCOM voice is to be used over the intended route of flight, SATCOM voice short codes (INMARSAT) or direct dial commercial numbers (IRIDIUM) must be available. If not available, prior coordination with the appropriate ATS (FIR) facility is required.

Note.Para: SATCOM is to be used only as a backup to normal HF communications.

MaintenanceNote.Para: If desired, the inoperative HF radio may be deactivated.

ListItem.Para: For left HF radio inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HF-L and lock with an INOP tag.
For right HF radio inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HF-R and lock with an INOP tag.

OperationProcedure.Para: Ensure SATCOM voice is available over the intended route of flight.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Any in excess of those required may be inoperative.

MaintenanceNote.Para: If desired, the inoperative HF radio may be deactivated.

ListItem.Para: For left HF radio inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HF-L and lock with an INOP tag.
For right HF radio inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HF-R and lock with an INOP tag.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Operation required HF datalink communication/surveillance (ADS-C, CPDLC, DCL, OCL, D-ATIS) is not permitted.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.
